Name: updateUsers
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "auth"."users" SET "locale" = $1::varchar WHERE NOT (users."disabled" = $2::bool) RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."disabled" AS "disabled", mutation_result."locale" AS "locale" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
